element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Required for accessing tight spaces and bomb jumping
Enables bomb jumping and morphball combat; foundational tech
Expands combat options; required for breaking certain walls
Upgraded missile variant; more destructive power
Highest explosive power; required for late-game progression
Increases jump height; enables vertical exploration
Sustained high-speed running; destroys barriers; enables shinespark charging
Swinging across chasms; enables access to isolated areas
Continuous mid-air jumping; transforms vertical movement capability
Allows jumping while in morph ball form; synergizes with bomb jumping
Weapon charging mechanic; can be combined with other beams
Wide beam spread; incompatible with Plasma Beam
High-power beam weapon; incompatible with Spazer; required for late bosses
Reveals hidden items and passages; aids secret finding
Freezes enemies and projectiles; enables ice platform traversal
Heat protection; enables access to hot areas (Norfair)
Water navigation and protection; reduces water friction
Rapid wall-to-wall jumping; advanced movement tech
Frame-perfect charging and release mechanic; high-skill movement option
Ultimate weapon; given by dying Metroid; one-use only

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing a locked area after acquiring key item
typical_tension_triggers: Entering locked area with health low
Traversing dangerous environment (lava, acid, water without Gravity Suit)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear exploration with natural escalation. Early game establishes navigation and combat basics in safe Crateria. Mid-game spreads across three major regions (Brinstar, Norfair, Maridia) with increasing environmental hazards and ability gating. Late game concentrates tension through mandatory boss sequence and locked-path progression toward Mother Brain. Tension releases are player-controlled through save station access and power-up discovery; relief is spatial rather than time-based.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Doors and passages that require specific power-ups (missiles for cracked walls, bombs for certain blocks, beams for specific barriers). Secret areas often hidden behind seemingly solid walls requiring X-ray Scope or specific weapons to reveal.
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden passages often placed: behind destructible walls (bomb blocks, missile doors), above tall jumps requiring recently-acquired mobility upgrades, in branching paths off main corridor. X-ray Scope hints at secret locations. Etecoons and Dachora placement telegraphs optional/secret areas.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Crateria introduction very forgiving. Basic enemies (Zoomer, Ripper, Atomic), wide safe corridors, clear upward progression. Bomb Torizo first mini-boss is tutorial-like threat. Player learns jump, shoot, morph mechanics with minimal punishment.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Significant difficulty spike upon leaving Crateria. Brinstar introduces higher-damage enemies and environmental hazards. Norfair heat damage and lava introduce resource management pressure. Multiple boss encounters (Kraid, Crocomire, Phantoon, Botwoon) escalate combat complexity. Maridia underwater sections require Gravity Suit or expert navigation; most difficult regions. Player must manage multiple power-up dependencies and navigate maze-like spaces.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tourian final stretch is mandatory linear gauntlet with Metroid encounters (increasingly dangerous as game progresses) and culminating Mother Brain fight. Ridley encounter before Mother Brain is penultimate extreme test. Hyper Beam given at last moment relieves tension momentarily before final phase. Escape sequence after Mother Brain defeat is timed pressure event.
notable_spikes: Leaving Crateria into Brinstar/Norfair (environmental hazards debut)
Norfair heat management without Varia Suit first time
Maridia navigation and Botwoon boss (tight underwater space)
Mother Brain final phase (aggressive attack pattern, resource intensive)

notable_level_patterns.description: Save stations and gunship docking points serve as tension-relief anchors distributed throughout regions. Typically placed before major boss encounters and after significant hazard sequences. Player chooses when to engage danger versus when to return to safety.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Crateria landing site; save rooms before Norfair elevator; Maridia save point before Botwoon

notable_level_patterns.description: Tall vertical spaces gated by mobility upgrades (Hi-Jump Boots, Space Jump, wall-jump ability). Early attempts show blocked upper path; acquiring power-up unlocks same space, opening hidden upper areas and shortcuts.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Crateria upper reaches; various Brinstar vertical shafts

notable_level_patterns.description: Extended hazard sequences (lava rooms, acid corridors, spike floors) requiring both damage management and precise platforming. Pressure releases when entering next safe room.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Norfair lower regions (lava flows); Maridia acid pools and underwater pressure sections

notable_level_patterns.description: Corridor leading to boss typically features: clear path (no optional branches), increasingly confined space, escalating background music intensity, enemy encounters of same type as boss for pattern priming.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Approach to Kraid, Ridley, Mother Brain chambers

notable_level_patterns.description: Doors requiring specific missiles/power-bomb count or beam type create hard gates. Player must backtrack to ammo sources or replan route when ammo insufficient. Gates serve as pacing structure enforcing non-linear but gated exploration.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Super Missile and Power Bomb doors throughout mid/late game regions

notable_level_patterns.description: Seemingly dead-end rooms contain destructible walls (missile blocks, bomb blocks) or require specific beams. Encourages thorough room exploration and rewards learning destruction mechanics.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Crateria secret passages; Brinstar hidden power-ups behind bomb blocks
